name: Fried Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely crush round buttery crackers.
2. Remove skin and cut away any excess fat from chicken thighs.
3. Place butter or margarine in a pie plate; cover with waxed paper. Cook at high (100%) for 1 to 1 1/2 minutes until butter melts.
4. On the waxed paper, mix crumbs, paprika, salt, and rosemary.
5. Dip chicken thighs in butter or margarine; then coat with cracker-crumb mixture. Arrange coated chicken thighs on a rack in a 12x8-inch baking dish; cover dish with waxed paper.
6. Cook at high for 9 minutes. Remove the waxed paper and rotate the dish a half turn. Cook at high for 5-7 minutes longer until thighs are tender.
7. Let thighs stand for 5 minutes before serving.
